modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access full digital materials from Pearson.

full_description_text: User can't get past the first page of their online math book. They mentioned redeeming the code but still face issues. Also, there's an error code when trying to log into First Day Access.

description: User can't get past the first page of their online math book. They mentioned redeeming the code but still face issues. Also, there's an error code when trying to log into First Day Access.
